use_cases: Visualizing relationship flows between user segments or product categories
Displaying interaction patterns or connection strength in network data
Showing bidirectional flow data between multiple groups with color-coded intensity
Illustrating comparative matrix data as an intuitive circular diagram
Mapping connections in social or communication networks for analytics dashboards
ai_summary: An interactive chord diagram visualization component inspired by Airbnb's data design patterns. Renders SVG-based relational data using @visx/chord library, displaying matrix-based connections between 4 groups with vibrant gradient colors (pink-orange, purple-red, purple-green, blue-lime). Supports custom dimensions, configurable center size, and event handling for hover interactions. Features a warm neutral background with rounded corners, making complex relationship data visually accessible and aesthetically polished.
